sections.title: Restaurant Reservation
sections.subtitle: A conversation about booking a table for a birthday dinner

questions.question: Customer name: _______
questions.explanation: The customer's name is Anna White.|顾客名字是Anna White。

questions.question: Date: _______ May
questions.explanation: The reservation is for 20 May.|预订日期是5月20日。

questions.question: Time: 7:00 _______
questions.explanation: She books for 7:00 PM.|她预订晚上7点。

questions.question: Number of guests: _______
questions.explanation: She needs a table for ten people.|她需要一张十人桌。

questions.question: What type of cuisine does she prefer?
questions.explanation: She prefers Italian cuisine.|她喜欢意大利菜。

questions.question: Special occasion: birthday - age _______
questions.explanation: It is her 30th birthday.|这是她30岁生日。

questions.question: Does she have any dietary requirements?
questions.explanation: One guest has a nut allergy.|一位客人对坚果过敏。

questions.question: Phone number: _______
questions.explanation: Her phone number is 020 7946 0567.|她的电话号码是020 7946 0567。

questions.question: Email: _______@email.com
questions.explanation: Her email is anna.white@email.com.|她的邮箱是anna.white@email.com。

questions.question: How will she confirm the booking?
questions.explanation: She will confirm by email.|她将通过电子邮件确认。
